diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface, CreateHandlersInterface (x10), InitApp
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory
+- Safe summary: Helper for creating Hono app instances and composing handlers with typed environments and path parameters.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route
+- Safe summary: Utilities for retrieving route information from the request in Hono handlers including matched routes and path information.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, WSMessageReceive, WebSocketHelperDefineContext, WebSocketHelperDefineHandler
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for creating WebSocket upgrade handlers with typed events and context for sending messages and managing state.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie utilities for reading, writing, and deleting cookies including signed cookies with different prefixes (secure/host).
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient, hc (via import)
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing
+- Safe summary: Helper for creating test clients that intercept responses from a Hono app with custom fetch implementation.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter
+- Safe summary: Utilities for detecting runtime environment (Node, Deno, Bun, workerd, Fastly, etc.) and accessing runtime-specific global environment.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ./common
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css, src/helper/html, src/helper/css/common
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for generating CSS with hashed class names and managing stylesheets across server and client with view transitions.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify, buildStyleString
+- Reads as: none (self-contained)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common
+- Safe summary: Core CSS utilities providing functions for building, normalizing, minifying CSS class names and style strings with support for external class names.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy
+- Safe summary: Fetch API wrapper for implementing reverse proxy with custom fetch functionality, header filtering, and strict RFC compliance mode.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, getRouterName, inspectRoutes
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev
+- Safe summary: Development utilities for displaying router information and route details to console with optional colorization.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html
+- Safe summary: Helper for rendering HTML with automatic escaping of dynamic values and support for reactive callbacks.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGResult, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generation helper for prerendering routes and saving content to disk with customizable plugins and hooks.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, generateFilePath, determineExtension, parseResponseContent, defaultExtensionMap, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface
+- Reads as: ./middleware, ./utils, ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/concurrent, ../../utils/mime
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/helper/ssg/middleware
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation for generating static content from Hono routes, filtering dynamic routes, and saving files with configurable file extensions and concurrency.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for SSG including path manipulation, filtering routes for static generation, and detecting dynamic route parameters.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSGParams, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, SSG_DISABLED_RESPONSE
+- Reads as: ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg
+- Safe summary: Middleware utilities for controlling SSG behavior including adding generate params, checking if request is from SSG context, and disabling/enabling SSG.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming, src/helper/streaming/stream
+- Safe summary: Main entry point
